hibernate-mapping.sql-query: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[ROI_Conversion_Get_Facilities_RequestMain]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Get_Facilities_RequestMain]
select a.name FROM Users a join [ROI_RequestMain] b on (b.[Created_By_Seq] = a.[UserInstanceId]) where b.[ROI_RequestMain_Seq] = :requestId
select distinct a.name as name FROM Users a join [ROI_RequestMain] b on (b.[Created_By_Seq] = a.[UserInstanceId])
select ROI_RequestMain_seq as requestId FROM [ROI_RequestMain] where [Created_By_Seq] not in ( select userinstanceId from [Users]);
select b.[FACILITY_NAME] as name, a.[Facility_Code] as code from [ROI_SalesTaxPerFacility] a join [FACILITY_FILE] b on (a.[Facility_Code] = b.[Facility_Code])

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[ROI_Conversion_Get_All_Facilities_RequestMain]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Get_All_Facilities_RequestMain]
